query:
-- How many Telstra services have zero revenue?
SELECT 
  serviceType,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(monthlyCost) as totalCost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyRevenue = 0 OR monthlyRevenue IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as zeroRevenue,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyRevenue > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasRevenue
FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'Telstra'
GROUP BY serviceType
ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT

  SUM(monthlyCost) as totalCost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyRevenue = 0 OR monthlyRevenue IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as zeroRevenue,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyRevenue > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasRevenue
FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'Telstra'
GROUP BY serviceType
ORDER BY count DESC;
